sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, xml_data XML, nested_data VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, xml_data, nested_data) VALUES (1, '<root><item>Value1</item></root>', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, xml_data, nested_data) VALUES (2, '<root><item></item></root>', 'Test');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, xml_data, nested_data) VALUES (3, '<root><item>Value3</item></root>', 'Test2');
SELECT xte_nodebld_final(xml_data, 'Replacement') != '<root><item></item></root>' FROM test_table WHERE nested_data IS NULL;
SELECT id, xte_nodebld_final(xml_data, 'Replaced') AS corrected_xml FROM test_table WHERE corrected_xml != '<root><item></item></root>' GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) != 0;

SELECT DISTINCT xte_nodebld_final(xml_data, 'First') FROM (SELECT xml_data FROM test_table WHERE nested_data IS NOT NULL) AS temp_table WHERE xte_nodebld_final(xml_data, 'Another') != '<root><item>Value1</item></root>' ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, CASE WHEN xte_nodebld_final(xml_data, 'Value') != '<root></root>' THEN 'Valid' ELSE 'Invalid' END AS validation FROM test_table;
SELECT id, xte_nodebld_final(xml_data, 'Drop') FROM test_table WHERE xte_nodebld_final(xml_data, 'Test') != xte_nodebld_final('<root><item></item></root>', 'NotEmpty');

SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE (xte_nodebld_final(xml_data, 'Check') != '<root><item></item></root>' AND nested_data IS NOT NULL) OR (xte_nodebld_final(xml_data, '<root>') != xte_nodebld_final(NULL, 'Default')) ORDER BY id;
SELECT xte_nodebld_final(xml_data, 'Edge') AS result FROM test_table WHERE result != 'irrelevant' AND (nested_data IS NOT NULL OR xml_data IS NULL);
